scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w gateway" "npm run dev -w services/restaurant-service" "npm run dev -w services/order-service" "npm run dev -w services/delivery-service" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.seed: npm run seed -w services/restaurant-service && npm run seed -w services/order-service && npm run seed -w services/delivery-service
scripts.build: npm run build -w gateway && npm run build -w services/restaurant-service && npm run build -w services/order-service && npm run build -w services/delivery-service && npm run build -w frontend
